title: TickerInput
description: Fields available on each ticker object passed to stock agents.

name.description: Ticker symbol (e.g. 'CHWY'). Identical to 'symbol' — both are normalised to this key by the pipeline.

symbol.description: Ticker symbol — alias for 'name'. One of the two will be present depending on the data source.

sector.description: GICS sector the company belongs to (e.g. 'Consumer Discretionary'). May be null.

price.description: Most recent closing price in USD.

market_cap.description: Market capitalisation as a string with B (billions) or M (millions) suffix, e.g. '8.34B' means $8.34 billion. This is NOT a raw number.

atr.description: Average True Range over the last 14 trading days, in USD. Measures recent daily price volatility — higher value means larger intraday price swings.

pre_market_price.description: Latest pre-market trading price in USD (before 9:30 AM ET).

pre_market_chg.description: Pre-market price change as a percentage vs the previous regular-session close. Positive = up, negative = down. Example: 6.23 means +6.23%.

pre_market_volume.description: Pre-market trading volume as a string with K (thousands) or M (millions) suffix, e.g. '1.13M' means 1.13 million shares traded.
